case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. SALAH KHUDARI

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEANNETTE BRYANT, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT KHUDARI, SALAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
